description:
Minato plants the seeds received from Reiki, a divine tortoise, and more gods start to visit his garden.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Der Schrein des Berges und der heilige Baum des Gartens
Oyama no Hokora to, Niwa no Goshinboku
The Shrine in the Mountain and the Sacred Tree in the Garden.
御山の祠と, 庭の御神木
